notableEvents.label: Xander Bogaerts GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Xander Bogaerts grounds into a double play, shortstop Luisangel Acuña to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Manny Machado out at 2nd. Xander Bogaerts out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Gavin Sheets pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gavin Sheets flies out to right fielder Derek Hill.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Griffin Canning picks off Jarred Kelenic at 1st on throw to first baseman Ty France.

notableEvents.label: Derek Hill pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Derek Hill homers (2) on a fly ball to center field. Chase Meidroth scores.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Vargas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Vargas singles on a soft ground ball to pitcher Jason Adam.
